title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF T1NUNDAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PRESIDENT ROXAS, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, TO ELIZALDE MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3312 / 60 OG No. 44, 7182 (November 2, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3921, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF T1NUNDAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PRESIDENT ROXAS, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, TO ELIZALDE MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Tinundan Elementary School in the Municipality of President Roxas, Province of Capiz, is hereby changed to Elizalde Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1964.
